user_story: As a manager, I want to view enrolled employees with their class, department, position level, title, schedule and status, so that I can monitor training enrollment across my team.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Enrollment Program screen; When the page loads; Then a list displays employee, employee class, department, position level, title, schedule from, schedule to and status

user_story: As a manager, I want to filter enrollments by a schedule date range (From and To), so that I can focus on programs within a specific period.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Enrollment Program screen; When I select a From and To date and search; Then only enrollments within that schedule range are listed

user_story: As a manager, I want to filter enrollments by status such as Pending with me, Pending approval, Pending confirmation, Confirmed, Rejected, Published and Completed, so that I can act on the right stage of enrollment.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Enrollment Program screen; When I select a status value and search; Then only enrollments in that status are shown

user_story: As a manager, I want to view a weekly day breakdown (Su to Sa) for each enrollment, so that I can see which days the program runs.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Enrollment Program screen; When an enrollment is listed; Then the scheduled days across Sunday to Saturday are indicated

user_story: As a manager, I want to reset filters and refresh the list, so that I can restore the default view and see current data.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Enrollment Program screen; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then filters are cleared and the list reloads with current data
